g.text: - Takes .js files of Application Server (They are stored as UTF-8)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Decodes and processes UTF-8 files to UTF-16 with:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Lexical Analysis/Scanner reads the UTF-16 byte stream and groups

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: them into Tokens such as "KEYWORD", "IDENTIFIER" etc.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Parser checks the order of Tokens and builds the AST

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - The AST is only a hierarchical data structure and is not

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: executing any logical tasks and only stores data

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - The Interpreter Ignition of V8 translates the AST nodes into

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: a sequence of highly optimized, platform-independent Bytecode

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: instructions, preparing the functions for the Call Stack and

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Walks through the AST nodes using a tree-walking pattern

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Memory Allocation: The generated bytecode is saved in the V8 Heap

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: as an internal C++ object called a "BytecodeArray"

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - SharedFunctionInfo: V8 links this bytecode to a metadata structure called

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This structure holds information about the function (like its name, source position,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: and parameter count) and keeps the bytecode alive in memory.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - JSFunction Creation: For functions that are ready to be used immediately,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: V8 creates a concrete JSFunction object in the heap. This object links the function

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: to its current scope (Closure context) and points directly to the BytecodeArray.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - The "Ready" State: The functions are now fully compiled into bytecode,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: safely parked in the RAM (V8 Heap), and waiting in a passive state.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: They will remain here until they are actively pushed onto the Call Stack during

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Global Context Push: V8 takes the BytecodeArray of the global scope

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (the top-level code outside of any functions) and pushes it onto the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Top-Level Run: The interpreter runs this global bytecode line by line. It executes your configuration code,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: registers your API routes, and triggers the server initialization (e.g., app.listen(3000)).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Handover to Libuv: When the server startup code executes, it makes a native call to Libuv

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (Node.js's C++ asynchronous I/O library), instructing the Operating System to open a specific network port

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Entering Idle State: Once the global bytecode finishes, its context is popped off the Call Stack, leaving it

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Node.js does not close; it goes into an idle state and hands full control over to the Event Loop,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: waiting for the first HTTP request.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
